_comment: SECTION TASK MANIFEST (SAN-167 F1) — declarative, deterministic seed for the Content section. One entry per predefined task/document: id, display name, the skill that runs it, the AGENT that owns it (co-located — not resolved indirectly via SKILL_OWNER_MAP), the canonical output path (relative to brand/{slug}/), and dependencies. Seeded per client (extends the Foundation pattern in config/foundation-state.default.json). Verified by src/lib/__tests__/section-manifest.test.mts (owner-check: agent === skill owner) and rendered by the Content UI instead of hardcoded arrays. Mirrors the canonical flow in src/pages/api/content-creation/create-project.ts.
label: Content Creation
